summary: The implementation matches the intended ordering fix, but the affected HyperLiquidProvider Jest suite fails. Requesting changes until the failing missing-price regression is fixed and the suite passes.

comments.body: This updated missing-price regression currently fails: `placeOrder` returns success because the default `mockSubscriptionService.getCachedPrice('BTC')` still returns `50000`, so the `{}` `allMids` mock is never the only price source. Clear the cached price in this test, for example with `mockSubscriptionService.getCachedPrice.mockReturnValueOnce(undefined)`, so it actually exercises the missing REST price path.
File-size guardrail: this touched provider is 8,627 lines, above the 2,500-line hard limit. Please split/refactor before merge per the review task guardrail.
File-size guardrail: this touched test file is 10,619 lines, above the 2,500-line hard limit. Please split/refactor the suite before merge per the review task guardrail.
